member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Fixed.FixedDocumentAgentToolsBase
member.summary: Base class for PDF (Fixed) document agent tools that provides document access via a repository.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Fixed.FixedDocumentAgentToolsBase.#ctor(Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.IFixedDocumentRepository)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with the specified fixed document repository.
member.param: The fixed document repository for document access.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Fixed.FixedDocumentContentAgentTools
member.summary: Provides agent tools for creating and manipulating PDF document content. These tools handle content segments including text, images, tables, and document structure.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Fixed.FixedDocumentContentAgentTools.#ctor(Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.IFixedDocumentRepository,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with the specified repository.
member.param: The fixed document repository for document access.
The directory path where images are stored for image segments.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Fixed.FixedDocumentFormAgentTools
member.summary: Provides agent tools for working with PDF form fields. These tools handle form field reading and filling operations.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Fixed.FixedDocumentFormAgentTools.#ctor(Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.IFixedDocumentRepository)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with the specified repository.
member.param: The fixed document repository for document access.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.AgentTools.Fixed.FixedFileManagementAgentTools
member.summary: Provides document lifecycle management tools for creating, listing, and exporting fixed documents (PDFs).
